research_topics: Gold-silver ratio mean reversion with ML regime filters
BTC on-chain metrics (MVRV/SOPR) for cycle positioning
Multi-agent LLM debate systems for trading
COT positioning as silver prediction signal

findings.finding: Information Coefficient (IC = Spearman corr of predicted vs actual returns) based weighting outperforms static weighting. IR = IC * sqrt(N). Dynamic IC recalculation on rolling window adapts to regime changes automatically.
findings.relevance_to_us: HIGH. Our system uses equal weighting (1 vote each). IC-weighting would upweight qwen3 (59.9%) and downweight news_event (50.7%) automatically. Could replace manual accuracy gates.

findings.topic: HMM regime detection for signal selection
findings.finding: Hidden Markov Models classify markets into trending/ranging/volatile regimes. Trend-following signals perform better in trending regimes, mean-reversion in ranging. HMM acts as a meta-switch.
findings.relevance_to_us: HIGH. Our system has regime penalties (0.75x ranging, 0.80x high-vol) but applies them uniformly. HMM would selectively enable/disable specific signals per regime.

findings.topic: Gold-silver ratio Kalman filter mean reversion
findings.finding: Academic paper confirms gold-silver cointegration. Kalman filter for dynamic hedge estimation + z-score normalization + ML regime filter (GB, SVM). Ratio currently ~57 vs 65-70 long-term mean.
findings.relevance_to_us: MEDIUM. We track gold-silver ratio via metals_cross_asset signal (54.6% acc). Could enhance with Kalman filter approach.

findings.topic: BTC MVRV Z-Score for cycle positioning
findings.finding: MVRV Z-Score at 0.41 - far below cycle-top readings of 3.5-4.0. Multi-signal on-chain framework achieved 84.3% accuracy for macro cycle positioning.
findings.relevance_to_us: HIGH. Our onchain signal shows 60% accuracy on 45 samples (too few). MVRV Z-Score at 0.41 confirms mid-cycle, not overvalued.

findings.topic: Multi-agent LLM debate for trading decisions
findings.finding: TradingAgents v0.2.0 uses specialized agents. Apex Quant uses bull/bear/moderator debate structure. Both show improved performance over single-agent.
findings.relevance_to_us: LOW-MEDIUM. Our signal system is essentially a multi-agent ensemble. The gap is combination method (equal votes vs IC-weighted).

findings.topic: COT positioning as silver leading indicator
findings.finding: Managed Money net long just 5,472 contracts. At the rally to $121, hedge funds were at multiples. Massive room for fresh institutional buying above $92.
findings.relevance_to_us: HIGH. Our cot_positioning signal shows 80% accuracy but only 10 samples. Need to increase sample collection rate.

findings.finding: WFO divides data into in-sample/out-of-sample segments. Far more predictive of live performance than standard backtesting. Genetic algorithms suited for multi-modal financial optimization.
findings.relevance_to_us: MEDIUM. Would prevent small sample illusion problem (Chronos 76% on 34 samples crashed to 54%).

recommended_improvements.title: IC-based dynamic signal weighting
recommended_improvements.description: Replace equal-weight voting with IC-weighted ensemble. Calculate rolling 7d IC per signal, weight by IC.

recommended_improvements.title: Enable drift_regime_gate signal
recommended_improvements.description: drift_regime_gate has 59.3% accuracy on 1403 samples but is disabled. Enable it.

recommended_improvements.title: Fix outcome tracking for 28 zero-sample signals
recommended_improvements.description: 28 signals generate predictions but have 0 outcome samples. Fix outcome tracker to track ALL signals.

recommended_improvements.title: Regime-conditional signal gating via HMM
recommended_improvements.description: Add HMM-based regime detection. Gate signals by regime - momentum in trending, MR in ranging.

recommended_improvements.title: Qwen3 directional gating
recommended_improvements.description: Qwen3 has 33.4% BUY but 73% SELL accuracy. Only use SELL signals, force HOLD on BUY.
